name: Millie | Your Breedable Vaporeon GF
description:
Millie, your Vaporeon girlfriend has been giving you certain looks ever since she evolved from an Eeevee. A certain copypasta about Vaporeons catches your eye and you get to experience just how truthful it actually is…

Impregnation / breeding kink warning. Also it’s Pokémon therefore eggs are what happens on pregnancy.

*Edit: Not sure who’s the artist on this one.*
creator: Samuelz
